title: WASM target — packaging and deployment
purpose: Package a beamr WASM runtime with pre-loaded .beam modules into a deployable unit for browsers and edge workers (Cloudflare Workers, Deno Deploy).

requirements.title: WASM bundle builder
requirements.spec: Package beamr WASM + .beam modules into a single deployable artifact.
acceptance: Bundle contains: beamr.wasm, compiled .beam files, bootstrap JS
Bootstrap JS initializes the VM and loads modules on startup
Bundle can be loaded with a single <script> tag or import
Test: build bundle, load in headless browser, verify execution

requirements.title: Edge worker deployment
requirements.spec: Deploy beamr WASM to edge worker platforms.
acceptance: Cloudflare Workers: fetch handler spawns a BEAM process per request
Request/response conversion via B-146 term conversion
Cold start under 50ms for pre-compiled bundles
Test: deploy to miniflare (local CF Workers simulator), verify request handling

boundaries: SHALL NOT implement persistent state across requests — each request is stateless
SHALL NOT implement WebSocket upgrade — HTTP request/response only
verification: cargo test -p beamr passes with all tests green
